name: MSI SPATIUM M480 PCIe 4.0 NVMe M.2 PLAY 1TB Internal Solid State Drive - PCIe Gen4x4 - NVMe 1.4 - M.2 2280 - 3D NAND - PS5 Compatible Heatsink - Sequential Read up to 7000MB/s - Sequential Write up to 5500MB/s (SM480PN1TB)
shortName: MSI SPATIUM M480 PCIe 4.0 NVMe M.2 PLAY 1TB
description: A 1TB internal NVMe SSD with PCIe 4.0 x4 interface, PS5 compatible heatsink, and high-speed performance for gaming.
